schema.description: Describes the request body of the /debug/{datasource}/document/events API call.

objectType.description: Object type of the document to get lifecycle events for.

docId.description: Glean Document ID within the datasource to get lifecycle events for.

startDate.description: The start date for events to be fetched. Cannot be more than 30 days (default 7 days) in the past.

maxEvents.description: Max number of events to be fetched. Cannot be more than 100 (default 20).

schema.title: DebugDocumentLifecycleRequest
